title: epipactis tremolsii subsp. duriensis
intro: Epipactis tremolsii subsp. duriensis, also known as the Durís Helleborine, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis tremolsii subsp. duriensis include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
